main.head: Trader FAQs:
main.pre: Today we’d like to answer the most frequently asked questions about the withdrawal process.

one.title: What is the minimum and maximum amount I can withdraw?
one.text: The minimum amount of withdrawal is $10 and the maximum is $1 000 000, we hope these will give you quite a freedom of choice.

two.title: How soon after making my first profit can I withdraw?
two.text: Immediately! Your money is always yours and you are not restricted by any terms in this regard.

three.title: Do I have to use the same payment option to withdraw as I did to deposit?
three.text: Yes, it’s important that you withdraw to the same card or e-wallet you used initially, otherwise the system will cancel the request. The withdrawal amount must not be larger than the deposit made from that card (no amount limits for the e-wallets, though).

four.title: What will the currency of my withdrawal be?
four.text: If your IQ Option account currency is different  to the bank account’s currency, the funds will be exchanged by your payment system according to the current exchange rate.

five.title: How soon will I receive my money?
five.text: It takes us up to 3 days to process a withdrawal request (1 day for the VIPs). The time of payment also depends on the bank or the e-wallet system you’re using (ranging from 1 day for the e-wallets and up to 7-9 days for the banks).

cta.pre:
Still have some questions?
Don’t hesitate to contact our Support Team!
